name: anvilnote-desktop
description: Desktop packaging and Electron shell for AnvilNote.

scripts.pack: pnpm prepare:desktop && pnpm build:main && electron-builder --mac dir --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.dist:dmg: pnpm prepare:desktop && pnpm build:main && electron-builder --mac dmg --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.dist:pkg: pnpm prepare:desktop && pnpm build:main && electron-builder --mac pkg --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.dist:mac: pnpm prepare:desktop && pnpm build:main && electron-builder --mac dmg pkg --config electron-builder.config.cjs
